
```javascript
async function handler(input) {
  // Sample tasks data
  const tasksData = [
    { id: 1, title: "Review pull request", status: "in-progress", priority: "high" },
    { id: 2, title: "Update documentation", status: "pending", priority: "medium" },
    { id: 3, title: "Fix login bug", status: "completed", priority: "high" },
    { id: 4, title: "Design new dashboard", status: "pending", priority: "low" },
    { id: 5, title: "Deploy to production", status: "in-progress", priority: "high" },
    { id: 6, title: "Write unit tests", status: "pending", priority: "medium" },
    { id: 7, title: "Optimize database queries", status: "completed", priority: "high" },
    { id: 8, title: "Schedule team meeting", status: "completed", priority: "low" },
    { id: 9, title: "Refactor authentication module", status: "in-progress", priority: "high" },
    { id: 10, title: "Update dependencies", status: "pending", priority: "medium" }
  ];

  try {
    // Validate input
    if (!input || typeof input !== "object") {
      return { error: "Invalid input: must be an object" };
    }

    const { status } = input;

    // Validate status parameter
    if (!status || typeof status !== "string") {
      return { error: "Invalid status: must be a non-empty string" };
    }

    const normalizedStatus = status.toLowerCase().trim();

    // Valid status values
    const validStatuses = ["pending", "in-progress", "completed"];
    if (!validStatuses.includes(normalizedStatus)) {
      return {
        error: `Invalid status: must be one of ${validStatuses.join(", ")}`
      };
    }

    // Filter tasks by status
    const matchingTasks = tasksData.filter(
      task => task.status.toLowerCase() === normalizedStatus
    );

    return {
      data: {
        status: normalizedStatus,
        count: matchingTasks.length,
        tasks: matchingTasks
      }
    };
  } catch (err) {
    return { error: `Handler error: ${err.message}` };
  }
}

// Main execution
async function main() {
  // Test cases
  const testCases = [
    { status: "pending" },
    { status: "in-progress" },
    { status: "completed" },
    { status: "PENDING" }, // Test case insensitivity
    { status: "invalid" }, // Test invalid status
    {}, // Test missing status
    null // Test null input
  ];

  console.log("Testing task filter handler:\n");

  for (const testInput of testCases) {
    const result = await handler(testInput);
    console.log(`Input: ${JSON.stringify(testInput)}`);
    if (result.data) {
      console.log(`Result: Found ${result.data.count} task(s) with status "${result.data.status}"`);
      result.data.tasks.forEach(task => {
        console.log(`  - [${task.id}] ${task.title} (Priority: ${task.priority})`);
      });
    } else {
      console.log(`Error: ${result.error}`);
    }
    console.log();
  }
}

main();
```
